headline: Applied Industrial Technologies (AIT) Tops Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Applied Industrial Technologies (AIT) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +0.84% and +2.23%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: What To Expect From Generac’s (GNRC) Q1 Earnings
summary: Power generation products company Generac (NYSE:GNRC) will be reporting results this Wednesday before market open. Here’s what to look for.
